results.title: UBI pilot shows mixed results in Finland
results.content: Finland's UBI trial showed partially positive outcomes; some measures improved, others did not.

results.title: UBI criticized as economically unsustainable
results.content: Economists note the nuanced reality; UBI has some truth but also significant tradeoffs.

results.title: Mixed evidence on UBI from OECD review
results.content: OECD finds partially true claims on both sides of the UBI debate.
